symptoms.symptom_name: Herald patch then Christmas-tree oval eruption with trailing collarette scale

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Herald patch + collarette + Christmas-tree pattern is characteristic of PR.
Tinea has outward-facing leading-edge scale, not an inward collarette.

symptoms.symptom_name: Palms/soles/mucosa clear; no lymphadenopathy; no new drug

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sparing of palms/soles and absence of mucosal patches/lymphadenopathy argue strongly against secondary syphilis.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: PR is clinical; no routine tests for the classic pattern.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Syphilis serology if palms/soles involved or atypical
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To exclude secondary syphilis where the presentation is atypical.
